# Take 5 - Internationalization - Flutter

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EY7tF7ryLVw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

## Description

Source Code: https://github.com/rodydavis/flutter_take_5

In this video I show you how easy it is to internationalize your Flutter application. You can use VSCode to generate the code fo you, and have Google Translate create the other languages based off of your default locale.

Website: https://rodydavis.com
Twitter: @rodydavis
Github: @rodydavis
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/rodydavis
Buy Me A Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/3mgFNYd
